prompt: Create comparison blog post for Redux vs Zustand vs Context API

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese and English files are created

assertions.name: guide_style_used
assertions.description: Uses guide style appropriate for comparison content

assertions.name: has_comparison_tables
assertions.description: Includes comprehensive comparison tables for all three approaches

assertions.name: has_code_examples
assertions.description: Contains code examples for Context API, Redux, and Zustand

assertions.name: covers_all_three
assertions.description: Provides equal coverage for Context API, Redux, and Zustand

assertions.name: has_decision_guide
assertions.description: Includes guidance on when to use which approach

assertions.name: covers_all_points
assertions.description: Covers pros/cons, best use cases for each as mentioned in notes
